creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
If firefox is configured to allow pages to choose their own fonts and you visit a uk government website (https://www.gov.uk/) the tab crashes.

If you configure firefox to disallow pages to choose their own fonts the tab works fine. 

This has been happening for some time (at least 3 months, but possibly much longer). I just tried this with firefox-76.0_3,1 on FreeBSD 12.1 amd64 and with a brand new profile.

Note that with firefox for OS X this doesn't happen, so the issue appears to be specific to FreeBSD.

I am a very heavy user of firefox on FreeBSD and this only ever seems to happen for uk government websites, they seem to provide their own fonts.
